subcodes.first_line: O loved ones of ‘Abdu'l-Baha! Praise be to God! The fragrances of holiness are spread abroad. The pearls of bounty are scattered everywhere.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای عبدالبهاء الحمد لله نفحات قدس منتشر است و لئالی عطاء منتثر نور هدی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
